{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-42797", "cvss": {"score": 4.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:H/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 4.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:H/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-202", "name": "Exposure of Sensitive Information Through Data Queries"}], "description": "Exposure of Sensitive Information Through Data Queries vulnerability in Apache Syncope.

An administrator with adequate entitlements for Derived Schemas can create a malicious JEXL expression which allows any administrator with sufficient entitlements for User read to access User-related security-sensitive information.

This issue affects Apache Syncope: 3.0 through 3.0.16, 4.0 through 4.0.5, 4.1.0.

Users are recommended to upgrade to version 4.0.6 / 4.1.1, which fix this issue by further restricting the JEXL expression definition.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00436, "percentile": 0.34721}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-vr35-jm2f-8wg2", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-30T17:19:28Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-vr35-jm2f-8wg2", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-vr35-jm2f-8wg2"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-42797"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-25T16:16:20Z", "published_at": "2026-05-26T13:30:46Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-42797", "https://lists.apache.org/thread/5y7d277sntyytrmxnx2tfjr9ftcpq1s6", "http://www.openwall.com/lists/oss-security/2026/05/25/5", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-vr35-jm2f-8wg2"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/apache/syncope", "summary": "Apache Syncope Vulnerable to Exposure of Sensitive Information Through Data Queries", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-30T17:19:30Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-vr35-jm2f-8wg2", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.apache.syncope.core:syncope-core-provisioning-api"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 3.0.0-M0, <= 3.0.16"}, {"first_patched_version": "4.0.6", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.apache.syncope.core:syncope-core-provisioning-api"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 4.0.0-M0, < 4.0.6"}, {"first_patched_version": "4.1.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.apache.syncope.core:syncope-core-provisioning-api"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 4.1.0-M0, < 4.1.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
